3528327822.title: Happie HEPA 14 Air Purifier Aire Plus
3528327822.detail_text: Clean Air Every Day Breathe cleaner, fresher air with the Happie HEPA 14 Air Purifier. Ideal for homes with kids, pets, and newly renovated spaces. It captures up to 99.995% of airborne particles as small as 0.3 microns, including dust mites, pollen, pet dander, mold spores, bacteria, viruses, cigarette smoke, haze, and cooking fumes. PM2.5 and ultra-fine particles are also filtered effectively. • True HEPA 14 Filtration: Medical-grade efficiency for maximum protection. • Formaldehyde Purification: Perfect for homes with fresh renovations or sensitive occupants. • 468 m³/h CADR: Effective airflow and coverage for bedrooms and workspaces. Compact in size yet powerful in coverage, the Happie Air Purifier measures Ø250×452mm and weighs 3.7kg. It offers a smaller footprint with strong coverage up to 60 m². Quiet operation at no more than ≤60dB(A) ensures peaceful use in the living room. Whether protecting your loved ones or creating a healthier home environment, the Happie HEPA 14 Air Purifier delivers fresh peace of mind with every breath.
